title: stachys neurocalycina
intro: Stachys neurocalycina, also known as Chinese hedge nettle or Chinese artichoke, is a perennial plant native to China and parts of Eastern Asia, characterized by its edible tubers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys neurocalycina include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being consumed raw or dried for use in traditional Chinese medicine.
